calendar.matters:
APPEAL OF CIVIL JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Aug-29-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: julian Sarkar for Appellant Olga Childs via Zoom. Suzanne Grandt for Respondent State Bar of California via Zoom.

The request to withdraw from representation by Mr. Sarkar is granted.
The request for extension of time to file opening brief to January 6, 2023 is granted in part and denied in part; the requestion is extended to September 26, 2022 only and if not filed the case will be dismissed.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-19-2021 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-28-2021 Continued To Dec-15-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-12-2021 Continued To Oct-13-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-16-2021 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES:
Plaintiff OLGA CHILDS (Tel: 786-609-0712) in pro per;
Atty. SUZANNE C. GRANDT, Esq. of State Bar of California Office of General Counsel (Tel: 415-538-2369) for defendants Lauren Ferrara, Melanie Lawrence, Donna Hershkowitz, and The State Bar of California (via Zoom videoconference).

HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA, LAUREN FERRARA, MELANIE LAWRENCE, AND DONNA HERSHKOWITZ's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant The State Bar of California's demurrer to the complaint is sustained without leave to amend. (See Word minutes for complete ruling.)

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/EPS)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-09-2021 Continued To Aug-16-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Olga Childs (786-609-0712; olgachilds@yandex.ru), Plaintiff in propria persona.
Suzanne Grandt, Esq. (415-538-2369; suzanne.grandt@calbar.ca.gov) of State Bar of California Office of General Counsel for Defendants via Zoom.

ARGUED (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript) re: late filed opposition. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA, LAUREN FERRARA, MELANIE LAWRENCE and DONNA HERSHKOWITZ'S DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

The State Bar Defendants' demurrer is ordered off calendar for noncompliance with CCP 430.41, which requires a "meet and confer in person or by telephone" before a demurrer may be filed. The parties are ordered immediately to meet and confer. The State Bar's response to the complaint is now due by August 4, 2021.
